entity.summary: Seychelles-registered centralized cryptocurrency exchange launched as BitYard on April 1, 2020 and rebranded to BYDFi in January 2023.
entity.notes: Official anniversary material gives an April 1, 2020 launch date. The platform began under the BitYard name and introduced the BYDFi identity on January 5, 2023. Existing reviewed company material supports the Seychelles origin.

events.title: BitYard predecessor platform launched
events.description: The exchange now known as BYDFi officially launched under the BitYard name on April 1, 2020.
events.notes: The later identity change is recorded separately.

events.title: BYDFi identity introduced
events.description: The exchange adopted the BYDFi name and brand identity while continuing the existing service.
events.notes: The identity change preserved operating continuity.

evidence.title: BYDFi official website
evidence.notes: Official domain verifies the current BYDFi identity and active trading service.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange reference for BYDFi
evidence.notes: Independent exchange profile corroborates the current BYDFi identity and 2020 establishment year.

evidence.title: BYDFi Celebrate 3rd Anniversary
evidence.notes: Official anniversary announcement states that the exchange launched on April 1, 2020.

evidence.title: BYDFi identity announcement
evidence.notes: Official announcement records the January 5, 2023 identity change.
